title: [MTR4] Stepford County Railways British Rail Class 142
description: ResourcePack that adds the BR Class 142 Pacer from SCR to Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# Overview
![Stepford Express](https://i.imgur.com/EDVYKDy.png)
The British Rail Class 142 “Pacer” is a diesel multiple unit built between 1985 and 1987 by Leyland Bus and BREL in the United Kingdom.
Originally designed as a low-cost solution for lightly used regional and suburban routes, the Class 142 is based on bus technology and became well known for its distinctive ride characteristics.

The Class 142 was primarily used on regional and suburban services, especially in the north of England, where it later became strongly associated with Northern Rail operations.

This resource pack adds the British Rail Class 142 to Minecraft using Minecraft Transit Railway 4 (MTR4).
The original model was created by CW_315 for Transport Fever 2 and was adapted and ported to MTR4 by me, with adjustments to ensure proper functionality and performance within the mod.

## Included Livery

This resource pack currently includes the following livery:
- Waterline
- Stepford Express

# Disclaimer

This resource pack is not associated with, endorsed by, or an official product of British Rail, Stepford County Railways, CW_315, Transport Fever 2, or the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
All trademarks and brand names belong to their respective owners.
